This family consists of approximately 830 species, with the majority being native to the tropics and subtropics. The Polygalaceae family is part of the larger order Fabales, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Bredemeyera viscidula reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same family and order.
